name: Object Stack Stability Simulation
description: A robotics engineer must verify stacking configurations for an automated palletizing cell using CoppeliaSim's ZMQ Remote API. Programmatically evaluate at least 5 distinct stacking configurations of three or more physics-enabled objects each, ensuring the set includes both stable and unstable examples. For each configuration, perform a dynamic simulation for at least 2 simulated seconds to track object displacements. Classify configurations as 'stable' if all objects displace less than 0.05m, and 'unstable' otherwise. Export the per-object displacement records to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stack_stability_data.csv and the overall stability classification report to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/stack_stability_report.json.
